cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Namaste Kishori ji! This is Rohan from Meru Cabs. How are you today, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm good, thank you. You called about my complaint, right?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, sir. We take all safety concerns very seriously. Can you please tell me more about what happened with your last ride, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: The driver was not following the GPS and took a longer route. I felt very uncomfortable, sir.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 30s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A support agent from a ride-hailing app ([RIDE_HAILING_APP]) calls a user in response to a safety complaint they filed against a driver. The agent gathers more details about the incident for their investigation.
